title: Opening for Software Engineer at Practo

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Practo
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
